mapper.sql: s.id, s.user_id, u.username, s.schedule_name, s.mall_keys::text AS mall_keys_json, s.date_range_type, s.run_time::text AS run_time_text, s.enabled_yn, s.running_yn, to_char(s.last_run_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_run_at, to_char(s.next_run_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS next_run_at, s.last_error_message, to_char(s.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, to_char(s.updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hub_collect_schedule s JOIN users u ON u.id = s.user_id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.enabled_yn DESC, s.run_time ASC, s.id DESC

SELECT id, schedule_id, user_id, schedule_name, status, mall_keys::text AS mall_keys_json, date_range_type, fr_dt, to_dt, job_count, request_ids::text AS request_ids_json, error_message, to_char(started_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS started_at, to_char(finished_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS finished_at, to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM hub_collect_schedule_run_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hub_collect_schedule_run_log ( schedule_id, user_id, schedule_name, status, mall_keys, date_range_type, fr_dt, to_dt, job_count, request_ids ) VALUES ( #{scheduleId}, #{userId}, #{scheduleName}, #{status}, CAST(#{mallKeysJson} AS jsonb), #{dateRangeType}, #{frDt}, #{toDt}, #{jobCount}, CAST(#{requestIdsJson} AS jsonb) )
mapper.update: UPDATE hub_collect_schedule SET schedule_name = #{scheduleName}, mall_keys = CAST(#{mallKeysJson} AS jsonb), date_range_type = #{dateRangeType}, run_time = #{runTime}, enabled_yn = #{enabledYn}, running_yn = 'N', next_run_at = #{nextRunAtValue}, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{id}
UPDATE hub_collect_schedule SET enabled_yn = #{enabledYn}, running_yn = 'N', next_run_at = #{nextRunAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND id = #{id}

UPDATE hub_collect_schedule SET running_yn = 'N', next_run_at = CASE WHEN (CURRENT_DATE + run_time) > NOW() THEN (CURRENT_DATE + run_time) ELSE (CURRENT_DATE + run_time + INTERVAL '1 day') END, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE enabled_yn = 'Y' AND (running_yn = 'N' OR updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes') AND next_run_at <= NOW() - (CAST(#{maxCatchUpMinutes} AS int) * INTERVAL '1 minute')
mapper.select: WITH picked AS ( SELECT id FROM hub_collect_schedule WHERE enabled_yn = 'Y' AND (running_yn = 'N' OR updated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes') AND next_run_at <= NOW() ORDER BY next_run_at ASC FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT #{limit} ), updated AS ( UPDATE hub_collect_schedule s SET running_yn = 'Y', updated_at = NOW() FROM picked WHERE s.id = picked.id RETURNING s.* ) SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, updated.id, updated.schedule_name, updated.mall_keys::text AS mall_keys_json, updated.date_range_type, updated.run_time::text AS run_time_text, updated.enabled_yn, updated.running_yn, to_char(updated.last_run_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS last_run_at, to_char(updated.next_run_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS next_run_at, updated.last_error_message, to_char(updated.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, to_char(updated.updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at FROM updated JOIN users u ON u.id = updated.user_id
mapper.update: UPDATE hub_collect_schedule SET running_yn = 'N', last_run_at = NOW(), next_run_at = #{nextRunAt}, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hub_collect_schedule SET running_yn = 'N', next_run_at = #{nextRunAt}, last_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hub_collect_schedule_run_log SET status = 'SUCCESS', job_count = #{jobCount}, request_ids = CAST(#{requestIdsJson} AS jsonb), finished_at = NOW(), error_message = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
